/usr/lib/ccache/gcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsjtu_drone_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsjtu_drone_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/sjtu_drone_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sjtu_drone_interfaces/srv/detail/set_wind__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
